task_completion.description: Import Lakeside Chemical Supply data into CAMEO Data Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager is open and 'Lakeside Chemical Supply' is visible in the list of facilities or as the active facility.

task_completion.description: Update the fire district for the facility
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CAMEO Data Manager facility details screen, the Fire District field is set to 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'.
In the contacts section of CAMEO Data Manager, 'Patricia Okonkwo' is listed with phone '802-555-0293', and 'David Nguyen' is absent.

task_completion.description: Update the average daily amount for Hydrogen Peroxide
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the chemical inventory details for Hydrogen Peroxide, the average daily amount is shown as 4200 (or code 04).

task_completion.description: Update the storage location for Sulfuric Acid
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the storage location details for Sulfuric Acid, the location description is 'Drum Storage Building B'.

task_completion.description: Export the corrected Tier II dataset as XML
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CAMEO Data Manager export dialog or a file save dialog showing the file being saved as 'lakeside_corrected.xml' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical interface to make the changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Data Manager application being interacted with to modify records, rather than a terminal or script.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the XML files in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (like Notepad, VS Code, or Vim) is shown open with the contents of lakeside_chemical.xml or lakeside_corrected.xml.

integrity.description: The export process was done through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog for lakeside_corrected.xml is triggered from within CAMEO Data Manager's export functionality.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Facility: Lakeside Chemical Supply
Corrections required in CAMEO Data Manager:
1. Fire District: 'Station 12 - Montpelier Central'
2. Contacts: Add Patricia Okonkwo (Phone: 802-555-0293). Remove David Nguyen.
3. Hydrogen Peroxide (CAS 7722-84-1): Average daily amount = 4,200 lbs (code '04').
4. Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9): Storage location = 'Drum Storage Building B'.
Export path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\lakeside_corrected.xml
